sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Tha leh ngal hatna te'n Topa muzo kei,
Vangik pua leh tawldamna ngahto ta ding,
Thuakdansiam haksa lua To Zeisu lo in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Omdan zong kasiam ta, thuakdan zong kasiamta,
Hong makaih a hong hilhpa, To Zeisu a hi,
Apiang na khempeuh tung'h, lungdam dendinghi tang,
Omdan hong siamsakpa To Zeisu a hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sum leh paai deihna leh, Huaihamna te in.
Lamtawp cih nei thei lo, lungkim om theilo,
Gentheih haksat na leh lungzuan luankhi tawh,
Thuakdan nong siamsakpa To Zeisu a hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Gentheih zong kasiam ta, Hauhdan zong kasiamta,
Gilvah leh gilkial zong, thuakdan kasiam ta,
Hong it To Zeisu hang na khempeuh tungah,
Hong thahatsakpa hang hih theihloh nei keng.
